info.name: Expense Tracker — Dashboard
info.description:
Postman collection for the Dashboard API of the Expense Tracker Spring Boot application.

Set the following collection variables before running:
- `base_url` → http://localhost:8081
- `token`    → JWT obtained from POST /api/auth/login

variable.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /api/auth/login

request.description:
Returns the full dashboard for the authenticated user.

Includes:
- `thisMonthSummary`        — total spent and expense count for the current calendar month
- `budgetOverview`          — aggregated budget utilisation + per-budget status
- `recentExpenses`          — last 5 expenses ordered by createdAt DESC
- `upcomingRecurring`       — active recurring expenses with nextDueDate within the next 7 days
- `categoryBreakdown`       — this-month expenses grouped by category with percentages
- `unreadNotificationsCount`— count of unread notifications (badge indicator)

response.name: 200 OK — Full Dashboard
response.body:
